title.title: Article / Manuscript Title
title.description: The title of the individual article or manuscript that was submitted

journal-title.title: Journal title
journal-title.description: Title of the journal the individual article or manuscript was submitted to

volume.title: Journal Volume
volume.description: journal volume this article or manuscript was published in

issue.title: Journal issue
issue.description: Issue number of the journal this article or manuscript was submitted to

issns.title: ISSN information for the manuscript's journal
issns.description: List of ISSN numbers with optional publication type

publisher.title: Publisher
publisher.description: Publisher of the journal this article or manuscript was submitted to

publicationDate.title: Publication Date
publicationDate.description: Publication date of the journal or article this manuscript was submitted to

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.description: The abstract of the article or manuscript being submitted

authors.title: Authors of this article or manuscript
authors.description: List of authors and their associated ORCIDS, if available

under-embargo.title: Under Embargo
under-embargo.description: Indicates whether the article or manuscript is under embargo

Embargo-end-date.title: Embargo end date
Embargo-end-date.description: Date at which the article or manuscript may be made public
